title: System Settings Overview
drDigitalIntro:
System Settings is where you customize how your computer works.
• Open the Settings app.
• Adjust the trackpad, screen, sound, privacy, and keyboard.
• Think of it like your home — set it up the way you like.

playgroundTask.instructions: Explore System Settings. Navigate to Appearance and turn on Dark Mode.

drDigitalSuccess: Dark Mode on! You just navigated System Settings and changed a setting — that's all you ever do in there.
drDigitalHint: Click Appearance in the left sidebar, then find the Dark Mode toggle on the right and click it.
